name: Dried Beef Cream Cheese Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients except topping together in a mixing bowl.
2. Spread mixture in an 8-inch pie plate.
3. Sprinkle pecans on top.
4. Bake at 350 degrees (F) for 20 minutes.
5. Serve hot with Breton crackers.
6. Can be made ahead and refrigerated up to one day before baking.
